  • Method Details

    • build

      public @Nullable SLExpression build(OverloadedOperatorHandler.JMLOperator op, SLExpression left, SLExpression right) throws SLTranslationException
      Description copied from interface: OverloadedOperatorHandler.JMLOperatorHandler
      Apply the provided arguments to the operator which corresponds to the given JML operator.
      Specified by:
      build in interface OverloadedOperatorHandler.JMLOperatorHandler
      Parameters:
      op - the JML operator
      left - left side of the binary expression
      right - right side of the binary expression, null if op is unary.
      Returns:
      null if this handler is not able to do the translation.
      Throws:
      SLTranslationException - if translation fails (incompatible types e.g.)
